title: Chemnitz, Saxony — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chemnitz, Saxony: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chemnitz is a city in Saxony with a population of 245,000. A Saxon city of industry and culture, reinventing itself with a striking art scene, affordable living, and the European Capital of Culture legacy.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
